headline: Rare bear market signal flashing at 67% odds
detail: A historically rare signal is showing a 67% probability of a bear market developing. For a margin-heavy, tech-concentrated book like yours, this is the most important macro flag today - drawdowns get amplified and you have less room to hold through pain. PLTR, AVGO, CRWD, and SMH would all feel a broad tech selloff acutely.

headline: AI boom facing severe weather threat
detail: Severe weather is emerging as a meaningful operational risk for AI infrastructure, which is a core growth story behind names like PLTR and AVGO. If this narrative gains traction, it could pressure the AI-premium valuations baked into your chip and software holdings. Worth watching whether this becomes a recurring analyst concern.

headline: Laser weapons reshaping defense stock valuations
detail: Directed-energy and laser weapon systems are changing how the market prices defense tech companies. PLTR has significant defense and government contracts exposure, so any shift in defense spending priorities or contractor valuations could move it. Doesn't fix the current SELL signal but adds a longer-term watch item.

headline: US-Iran talks resuming Tuesday in Qatar
detail: Fresh nuclear or diplomatic talks reduce immediate geopolitical risk premium in the market, which is modestly risk-on for tech. However, the effect on your specific names is indirect - it matters more as background noise than a direct catalyst for AVGO, PLTR, or your chip ETFs.
